summary: Frontend testing complete for Mobile Action voice command app. All core features are functional. App loads correctly with branding, voice orb works, all 10 quick action chips are present and functional, command history accumulates correctly, and status text updates properly. Minor deprecation warnings present but not critical.

issues: Deprecated shadow* style props used (should use boxShadow for web compatibility)

action_items: Consider updating shadow* style props to boxShadow for better web compatibility (non-critical)
Consider updating expo-intent-launcher and expo-speech to recommended versions (non-critical)
seed_data_creation: None - app is fully offline with no backend
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working correctly. The app uses Web Speech API on web preview, so voice recognition requires browser permissions. Text input is intentionally hidden on web (only shows on native platforms). All 10 quick action chips work correctly: Flashlight, WiFi, Camera, Alarm, Maps, Call, Bluetooth, Time, Settings, Volume. Command history accumulates correctly and displays with timestamps. Status text updates properly with 3-second display time for results.
